# Figure description: Tectonic_Map_Translated.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/plan_data/Tectonic_Map_Translated.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **tectonic scheme (тектоническая схема)** — a compiled structural-geological map with an extensive multi-category legend. It is a composite figure assembled from multiple map sheet panels at **1:500,000 scale**, dated **1986**, depicting the tectonic framework of a fold system in the Tien Shan region. The figure includes a comprehensive legend panel (lower portion) and a structural annotation panel (upper right).

---

## Coverage and Subject

The map covers the **Western Part of the Tien Shan Fold System** ("Western Part of the Tien Shan Fold System and Its Surroundings"), specifically the **западной части Тенизской впадины и её обрамления** (western part of the Teniz Depression and its framing/surroundings). The map sheet reference visible is **Чдотск № 40** (Sheet No. 40). The scale is **1:500,000**, dated **1986**. A supplementary note references the **Западно-Тенизский ПРП** (West-Teniz prospecting-exploration area), and the map was compiled by geologist **Смолянникова Е.М.** (Smolyannikova E.M.), consistent with the Smolianova et al. authorship noted in the report context. An earlier date **1984 г.** is also visible in the upper-left portion of the map assembly, suggesting some panels predate the 1986 compilation.

---

## Key Content

### Map Patterns and Structure
The tectonic map is rendered across multiple overlapping panels in a collage/mosaic format, covering a large area with complex structural geology. The dominant visual features include:

- **Curvilinear and arcuate fold belts** depicted by contour-like structural lines forming closed ovals and elongated patterns — characteristic of anticline/syncline interference patterns in a fold-thrust belt setting.
- **Color coding** using pinks, oranges, tans/beiges, purples, and whites representing different tectonic units, structural stages, and rock complexes as defined in the legend.
- **Intrusive bodies** shown as irregular pink/red patches.
- **Structural boundaries** shown as bold lines, dashed lines, and fault symbols (including thrust symbols).
- The overall structural grain trends roughly **NW–SE to W–E**, consistent with Tien Shan orogenic architecture.
- The central-western portion of the map (the Teniz Depression itself) appears as a relatively less deformed basin surrounded by more intensely folded basement uplifts.

### Legend Structure (lower portion of figure)
The legend is organized into three major columns with Roman numeral sections:

**Column I (left) — Tectonic Units by Structural Stage:**
- Colored boxes representing **области байкальской складчатости** (Baikalian fold zones), **каледонской активизации** (Caledonian reactivation), **герцинской складчатости** (Hercynian folding), **эпигерцинской платформы** (epi-Hercynian platform), and **докембрийской кристаллической** basement.
- Subdivisions include **первый структурный этаж** (first structural stage — Ct₁), **второй структурный этаж** (second structural stage — Ct₂), **интрузии гранитоидов** (granitoid intrusions), and **палеозойские комплексы** (Paleozoic complexes).
- Labels include codes such as **Ct₁, Ct₂, Ct₃, рz₁, рz₂, рz₃, рz₄, рz₁Ct**, suggesting a detailed subdivision of Caledonian and Hercynian structural floors.
- **Мезозойский структурный комплекс** (Mesozoic structural complex) and **субцерийский этаж** (sub-Cretaceous stage) are also represented.

**Column II (center) — Sedimentary and Igneous Formations:**
- Subdivided into:
  - **Туфогенно-осадочные формации** (tuffaceous-sedimentary formations): including **краснобережная бесхалитная формация** (red-bed salt-free formation), **базальтово-терригенная формация** (basalt-terrigenous formation), **андезит-базальтовая формация** (andesite-basalt formation), **формация отложений рифтогенеза и грабенов** (rift and graben deposit formation), **вулканогенно-осадочная** (volcanogenic-sedimentary), **известково-терригенная формация** (calcareous-terrigenous), **порфиро-сланцевая формация** (porphyry-schist formation).
  - **Фосфатно-карбонатно-глубоководно-терригенная формация** (phosphate-carbonate-deep-water terrigenous formation).
  - **Терригенно-флишоидная формация** (terrigenous flyschoid formation).
  - **Постстрокная терригенная формация** (post-orogenic terrigenous formation).
  - **Кремниевые** (siliceous/chert formations).
  - **Е. Интрузивные формации** (Intrusive formations): **гранодиориты** (granodiorites), **субщелочные гранитоиды** (subalkaline granitoids), **щелочные габброиды, нефелиновые сиениты** (alkaline gabbros, nepheline syenites), **граниты нормального ряда** (normal-series granites), **алаколиты** (possibly alacrites/charnockites).

**Column III (right) — Sedimentary Formations and Structural Symbols:**
- **Осадочные формации** (sedimentary formations): **мезозойские и среднепалеозойские терригенные, турбидиты** (Mesozoic and mid-Paleozoic terrigenous, turbidites), **терригенно-карбонатные
